race.comment: Another race with plenty of key scratchings. IN HASTE (1) found the 1000m too slick at her local debut when well beaten in stronger grade. Her NZ form reads well for this, expecting a much better run up slightly in trip on her preferred soft ground. ELECTRIC ELVIS (6) resumes, now with the Reece Goodwin yard. He was in consistent form last time in and draws for every hope, respecting. DYNAMITE DANCER (5) resumes having won well before a break, he's got upside now with the Williams yard. He'll love the conditions and can go on with the job.  BAZZAR (4) resumes. He showed plenty of ability in four runs last time in, never missing a place. Profiles nicely for this and should take beating.
